title: Inversion for Emphasis
description: Front negative or restrictive adverbials — Never have I…, Not only… but also…, Hardly… when, No sooner… than — and master auxiliary inversion to add dramatic emphasis in formal writing and speech.
sources: CEFR C1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Martin Hewings, Advanced Grammar in Use (inversion after negative adverbials, Units 107–108)
